# PERF-87 negative: handler uses a custom binder for the trusted path
lang: go
file: PERF-087-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
)

type LoginRequest struct {
	User string `json:"user"`
	Pass string `json:"pass"`
}

type TrustedBinder struct{}

func (TrustedBinder) Bind(i interface{}, c echo.Context) error { return nil }

func Login(c echo.Context) error {
	var req LoginRequest
	_ = TrustedBinder{}.Bind(&req, c)
	return c.String(200, req.User)
}
